---

# Step 02 — Create PO (Three Methods)

**Persona:** Purchaser (Purchasing Staff / Buyer)
**Module:** 2
**Section:** 2.1
**Route:** `/procurement/purchase-order` (modal) → `/procurement/purchase-order/new` (Blank PO)

---

## 2.1 Access Path

From Step 01 — PO List: click **Add Purchase Order** (top-right blue button).

---

## 2.2 Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    list["1. PO List"] --> create["2. Create PO"]
    create -->|"Blank / Manual"| detail["3. PO Detail"]
    create -->|"From Price List"| pricelist["2a. Price List Wizard"]
    create -->|"From PR"| frompr["2b. From PR Wizard"]
    pricelist --> detail
    frompr --> detail
    detail -->|Edit| edit["4. Edit Mode"]
    edit -->|Submit| inprog(["IN PROGRESS — Pending FC Approval"])
    style create fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 2.3 Creation Method Selection Modal

Clicking "Add Purchase Order" opens a modal with three options:

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Get started                                 [×]        │
│  Create Purchase Order                                  │
│  Choose how you want to create a new purchase order.   │
│                                                         │
│  ┌──────────────┐ ┌──────────────┐ ┌──────────────────┐ │
│  │ 📄           │ │ 📋           │ │ 📨 ✦ Recommended │ │
│  │ Blank PO     │ │From Price List│ │    From PR       │ │
│  │Start from    │ │Use reference │ │Use approved PR   │ │
│  │scratch       │ │prices        │ │Generate PO lines │ │
│  │Fill in every │ │Start from an │ │from an approved  │ │
│  │field yourself│ │active price  │ │purchase request. │ │
│  │— no PR link  │ │list with pre-│ │                  │ │
│  │              │ │negotiated    │ │                  │ │
│  │              │ │vendor prices.│ │                  │ │
│  └──────────────┘ └──────────────┘ └──────────────────┘ │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

![Creation method selection modal](data:image/png;base64,)

| Option | Label | Subtitle | Description |
|--------|-------|----------|-------------|
| Blank PO | "Blank PO" | "Start from scratch" | "Fill in every field yourself — no PR linkage." |
| From Price List | "From Price List" | "Use reference prices" | "Start from an active price list with pre-negotiated vendor prices." |
| From PR | "From PR" (Recommended badge) | "Use approved PR" | "Generate PO lines from an approved purchase request." |

---

## 2.4 Method A: Blank PO

Clicking **Blank PO** navigates to `/procurement/purchase-order/new` — a full create form.

### 2.4.1 Form Layout

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ←  Add Purchase Order              [× Cancel][Create]│
│     Type : Manual                                   │
├───────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│ Date          │ Buyer              │ Department      │
│ 2026-04-26    │ ศิริวรรณ (Purchase)│ Guest Service…  │
├───────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│ Workflow *        │ Delivery Date *   │ Currency *    │
│ [Select Workflow] │ [📅 Select date]  │ [THB  ▼]     │
│ Exchange Rate     │ Vendor *          │ Credit Term   │
│ [1.00000 THB 🔒] │ [Select Vendor ⇅] │ [Select…  ▼]  │
├───────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│ Description                  │ Remarks               │
│ [Optional              0/256]│ [Optional       0/256]│
├───────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│ Items (0)                                [+ Add Item]│
│ # │Product│Order Qty│Unit│Unit Price│Disc%│Tax│…     │
│   No Items Yet  Add items to this purchase order.   │
│   [+ Add Item]                                      │
├───────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│ Subtotal 0.00│Discount 0.00│Net 0.00│Tax 0.00│Total  │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

![Blank PO create form](data:image/png;base64,)

### 2.4.2 Auto-Populated Header Fields (read-only)

| Field | Source | Default Value |
|-------|--------|---------------|
| Date | Server date on form open | Today's date (server time, GMT+7) |
| Buyer | Logged-in user's display name | Current user |
| Department | Buyer's department assignment | Current user's department |
| Type | Fixed for this creation method | "Manual" |

### 2.4.3 Editable Header Fields

| Field | Mandatory | Type | Default | Validation |
|-------|-----------|------|---------|------------|
| Workflow | Yes | Dropdown | — (blank) | Must select before Create |
| Delivery Date | Yes | Date picker | — (blank) | Must select before Create |
| Currency | Yes | Dropdown | THB | Must select before Create |
| Exchange Rate | No | Text (read-only) | Auto-populated from Currency | System-calculated; not editable |
| Vendor | Yes | Lookup button | — (blank) | Must select before Create |
| Credit Term | No | Dropdown | — (blank) | Optional |
| Description | No | Textarea | — (blank) | Max 256 characters |
| Remarks | No | Textarea | — (blank) | Max 256 characters |

### 2.4.4 Items Table Columns

| Column | Description | Mandatory | Type | Default |
|--------|-------------|-----------|------|---------|
| # | Row sequence number | — | Auto | Sequential |
| Product | Item lookup | Yes | Lookup button | — (blank) |
| Order Qty | Quantity to order | Yes | Spinbutton | 1 |
| Unit | Unit of measure | — | Dropdown (disabled until Product selected) | Auto from product |
| Unit Price | Price per unit | Yes | Spinbutton | 0 |
| Disc % | Discount percentage | No | Spinbutton | 0 |
| Tax | Tax profile | No | Dropdown | — (blank) |
| Net Amount | Calculated | — | Read-only | Qty × Price × (1 - Disc%) |
| Tax Amt | Calculated | — | Read-only | Net × Tax% |
| Total | Calculated | — | Read-only | Net + Tax |
| Details | Item details popup | — | Button link | — |
| Remove | Delete row | — | Icon button | — |

![Add Item dialog — product lookup and fields](data:image/png;base64,)

### 2.4.5 Action Buttons, Behaviour & Validation

> **Form states:**
> - **No items added:** Items table shows empty state with "No Items Yet" message and inline Add Item button.
> - **Items added:** Items appear as editable inline rows.

#### Button Summary

| Button | Color | Purpose / Use Case |
|--------|-------|---------------------|
| Cancel | Grey outline | Abandon PO creation and return to the list — use when you opened the wrong creation method or decided not to create a PO |
| Create | Blue (primary) | Save the new PO as DRAFT for later editing and submission — use when all mandatory header fields are filled |
| Add Item | Blue | Append a blank line to the items table — use to enter each product to be ordered |
| Remove (row) | Icon (trash) | Delete the item row from the form — use to remove an incorrectly added product |

#### On Create

**Purpose / Use Case:** Save the new PO as DRAFT so it can be reviewed and submitted for approval — use when mandatory header fields are complete and you are ready to add items.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | Workflow is not empty | — | Validation passes | Error highlight on Workflow field |
| 2 | Delivery Date is not empty | — | Validation passes | Error highlight on Delivery Date field |
| 3 | Currency is not empty | — | Validation passes | Error highlight on Currency field |
| 4 | Vendor is not empty | — | Validation passes | Error highlight on Vendor field |
| 5 | All mandatory item fields not empty (if ≥1 item) | — | PO saved as DRAFT | TBC — per-item validation highlight |
| 6 | All checks pass | — | PO created; navigates to PO Detail view mode | — |

#### On Cancel

**Purpose / Use Case:** Abandon the new PO creation and return to the PO list — use when you started the wrong creation method or decided not to create a PO at this time.

> TBC — whether a "Discard changes?" confirmation dialog appears before leaving the form.

---

## 2.5 Method B: From Price List (2-Step Wizard)

> ⚠️ **BRD Discrepancy:** This creation method is not described in the BRD (BR-purchase-orders.md). The BRD defines only two creation methods: Blank PO and Create from Purchase Requests. "From Price List" is a live implementation addition.

### 2.5.1 Step 1 — Select Vendors

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  From Price List                               [×]       │
│  Select Vendors                                          │
│  Choose vendors to load their active price lists.        │
│                                                          │
│  1 ●────────────────────────────── 2                     │
│  Select Vendors                    Review Price Lists    │
│                                                          │
│  🔗 Target workflow                         [General ▼]  │
│     PO will be routed through this approval flow         │
│                                                          │
│  ☐ │ Code         │ Name                │Type  │Currency │
│  ──┼──────────────┼─────────────────────┼──────┼─────────│
│  ☐ │ VN-2026-0088 │ Fresh Farm Co., Ltd.│General│ THB    │
│  ☐ │ VN-2026-0073 │ Ocean Catch Seafood │Seafood│ THB    │
│  ☐ │ VN-2026-0091 │ Premium Dairy Group │Dairy │ THB    │
│  ☐ │ VN-2026-0102 │ Mediterranean Imports│Import│ EUR   │
│  ☐ │ VN-2026-0055 │ Local Herbs Farm    │Produce│ THB   │
│                                                          │
│  [Cancel]                              [→ Next (disabled)]│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

![From Price List wizard — Step 1 Select Vendors](data:image/png;base64,)

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Target workflow | Required dropdown — workflow the resulting PO will follow |
| Vendor table | Lists vendors with active price lists; multi-select via checkboxes |
| Select all | Header checkbox — selects/deselects all vendors |
| N selected | Counter appears in header when ≥1 vendor checked |
| Next button | Disabled until ≥1 vendor selected AND Workflow selected |

**Vendor table columns:**

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| ☐ (checkbox) | Row selection |
| Code | Vendor code |
| Name | Vendor display name |
| Type | Vendor category badge |
| Currency | Vendor's trading currency |

### 2.5.2 Step 2 — Review Price Lists

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  From Price List                      1 selected  [×]    │
│  Review Price Lists                                      │
│  These price lists will become separate purchase orders. │
│                                                          │
│  ✅ ────────────────────────────────── 2 ●               │
│  Select Vendors                    Review Price Lists    │
│                                                          │
│  > │ Price List No  │ Vendor             │Eff.Date│Prods│
│  ──┼────────────────┼────────────────────┼────────┼─────│
│  > │ PL-2026-0042   │ Fresh Farm Co.,Ltd.│2026-04-01│ 3 │
│                                                          │
│  (Expanded row shows: Product | Quantity | Price | Total)│
│  ITM-00142 Organic Jasmine Rice  10  120.00 THB  1,200  │
│  ITM-00321 Fresh Tomato – Premium 20  35.00 THB    700  │
│  ITM-00000 Thai Basil             5  180.00 THB    900  │
│                                                          │
│  [Cancel]              [Back]            [✔ Confirm]     │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

![From Price List wizard — Step 2 Review (expanded)](data:image/png;base64,)

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Title | "Review Price Lists" |
| Subtitle | "These price lists will become separate purchase orders." |
| Price list table | One row per vendor's active price list |
| Expand icon | Expands row to show individual product lines |
| Confirm | Creates one PO per price list (one per vendor) as DRAFT |

**Price list table columns:**

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| (expand) | Chevron to expand/collapse product sub-table |
| Price List No | Price list identifier |
| Vendor | Vendor name |
| Effective | Price list effective date |
| Products | Count of products in the price list |
| Currency | Price list currency |
| Total | Sum of all product lines |

**Expanded product sub-table columns:**

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| Product | Item code + name |
| Quantity | Default order quantity from price list |
| Price | Unit price with currency |
| Total | Quantity × Price |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** In the observed price list (PL-2026-0042), the header Total showed 15,250.00 THB while the sum of the three visible product lines was 2,800.00 THB. The price list total may include products not shown on screen (e.g. paged or filtered), or it may reflect a different calculation. Requires confirmation.

---

## 2.6 Method C: From PR (2-Step Wizard)

### 2.6.1 Step 1 — Select Purchase Requests

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  From PR                                       [×]       │
│  Select Purchase Request                                 │
│  Choose a purchase request to create a purchase order    │
│  from.                                                   │
│                                                          │
│  1 ●────────────────────────────── 2                     │
│  Select PRs                        Review POs            │
│                                                          │
│  🔗 Target workflow                         [General ▼]  │
│     PO will be routed through this approval flow         │
│                                                          │
│  ☐ │ PR No.        │ Date       │ Requester │ Dept │ … │ │
│  ──┼───────────────┼────────────┼───────────┼──────┼───│ │
│  ☐ │ PR20260400059 │ 2026-04-07 │ ศิริวรรณ… │Guest…│…  │ │
│                                                          │
│  [Cancel]                              [→ Next (disabled)]│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

![From PR wizard — Step 1 Select Purchase Requests](data:image/png;base64,)

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Target workflow | Required dropdown |
| PR table | Lists approved PRs available for PO creation |
| Next button | Disabled until ≥1 PR selected AND Workflow selected |

**PR table columns:**

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| ☐ (checkbox) | Row selection |
| PR No. | Purchase Request number |
| Date | PR creation date |
| Requester | Name of the staff who created the PR |
| Department | Requester's department |
| PR Workflow | Workflow name used for the PR |
| Description | Optional PR description |

### 2.6.2 Step 2 — Review Grouped POs

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  From PR                              1 selected  [×]    │
│  Grouped Purchase Orders                                 │
│  Review grouped purchase orders created from selected PRs│
│                                                          │
│  ✅ ────────────────────────────────── 2 ●               │
│  Select PRs                        Review POs            │
│                                                          │
│  > │ PO No. │ Vendor                │Del.Date  │…│PR Ref │
│  ──┼────────┼───────────────────────┼──────────┼─┼───────│
│  > │ #01    │ คิงอาร์ต แอดเวอร์ไทซิ่ง│ 2026-04-06│…│PR…059│
│                                                          │
│  [Cancel]              [Back]            [✔ Confirm]     │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

![From PR wizard — Step 2 Review Grouped POs](data:image/png;base64,)

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Title | "Grouped Purchase Orders" |
| Subtitle | "Review grouped purchase orders created from selected PRs." |
| PO group table | System-generated PO groups — one per vendor found in selected PRs |
| PR Ref | Badge linking back to the source PR |
| Confirm | Creates all grouped POs as DRAFT |

**Key behaviour:** The system reads all items from the selected PRs, groups them by vendor, and creates one PO per vendor group. PO numbers in the preview are temporary (#01, #02…); actual PO numbers are assigned on Confirm.

**Grouped PO table columns:**

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| (expand) | Expand row to see individual item lines |
| PO No. | Temporary sequential number (#01, #02…) |
| Vendor | Vendor responsible for the items in this group |
| Delivery Date | Derived from PR delivery date |
| Currency | Vendor's currency |
| Total | Sum of item totals in this group |
| PR Ref | Source PR number badge |

---

## 2.7 Business Rules

| # | Rule | Reference |
|---|------|-----------|
| BR-01 | All three methods require Workflow selection before proceeding | Approval routing |
| BR-02 | Blank PO requires Vendor, Delivery Date, Currency, Workflow before Create | FR-PO-003 |
| BR-03 | From Price List creates one PO per vendor's price list | Grouping logic |
| BR-04 | From PR groups items by vendor and creates one PO per vendor group | FR-PO-002 |
| BR-05 | All POs created by any method start in DRAFT status | FR-PO-005 |
| BR-06 | Exchange Rate is auto-populated based on Currency selection and is not editable | Currency module |

---

## 2.8 Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| No approved PRs exist | From PR table is empty; Next button disabled |
| No active price lists exist | From Price List vendor table is empty |
| Multiple vendors selected in From Price List | Step 2 shows one price list row per vendor |
| PR has items from 3 different vendors | From PR Step 2 shows 3 grouped PO rows |
| Cancel on Step 1 | Dismisses wizard; returns to PO List |
| Cancel on Step 2 | Dismisses wizard; no POs created |
| Back on Step 2 | Returns to Step 1 with previous selections preserved |

---

## 2.9 Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|-------------|
| Cancel (any wizard step) | Step 01 — PO List |
| Create (Blank PO) | Step 03 — PO Detail (view mode, new DRAFT) |
| Confirm (From Price List) | Step 01 — PO List (new DRAFT POs created) or Step 03 — TBC |
| Confirm (From PR) | Step 01 — PO List (new DRAFT POs created) or Step 03 — TBC |

---

## 2.10 API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| POST | `/api/procurement/purchase-order` | Create new Blank PO |
| GET | `/api/procurement/vendor/price-lists` | Fetch vendors with active price lists |
| POST | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/from-price-list` | Create PO(s) from price list selection |
| GET | `/api/procurement/purchase-request?status=approved` | Fetch approved PRs for From PR wizard |
| POST | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/from-pr` | Create PO(s) from PR selection |
